name: vocab-voyage
description: Vocabulary tools for SAT, ISEE, SSAT, PSAT, GRE, GMAT, LSAT prep — 20 MCP tools + 17 interactive widgets (flashcards, quiz, study plan, progress, 11 mini-games, session debrief). 13 test-prep courses. Hosted endpoint, no install required.

bearer.description: Optional personal MCP token (vv_mcp_…) — generate at https://vocab.voyage/mcp to unlock personalized tools.

ui_resources.description: Hero card with today's vocab word, definition, audio button, and add-to-queue CTA. Powered by get_word_of_the_day.
Tap-to-flip flashcard deck. 'I knew this / I didn't' buttons persist mastery via the same tables as the web app. Powered by get_flashcards.
Interactive multiple-choice quiz. Per-answer events flow to record_word_result; session totals to record_session_complete. Powered by generate_quiz.
Seven-day expandable plan grid. 'Start Day N' launches a flashcard session seeded with that day's words. Powered by study_plan_preview.
Auth-only personal dashboard: streak, XP, mastery split, next-up words, and recent misses. Powered by get_my_progress.
Tap a word, then tap its definition. Per-pair answers persist via record_word_result; round end awards XP. Powered by play_game (slug=word_match).
Type the word from its definition (with audio). Per-word results persist; round XP awards via award_game_xp. Powered by play_game (slug=spelling_bee).
60-second timed sprint with streak bonuses. Powered by play_game (slug=speed_round).
Pick the closest synonym for each word. Powered by play_game (slug=synonym_showdown).
Unscramble the letters to spell each vocab word. Powered by play_game (slug=word_scramble).
Pick the word that completes each sentence. Powered by play_game (slug=fill_in_blank).
Infer each word's meaning from a surrounding sentence. Powered by play_game (slug=context_clues).
Hangman-style letter guessing for vocab words. Powered by play_game (slug=word_guess).
Match each word to its emoji-cued image. Powered by play_game (slug=picture_match).
Mini vocabulary crossword. Powered by play_game (slug=crossword).
Find hidden vocab words in a letter grid. Powered by play_game (slug=word_search).
Post-session summary with weak words, next-up queue, and Sparkle's recommended next action. Powered by get_sparkle_guidance / get_my_progress.
